prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约12119→10509→40783→24304→16803。2023年出现异常断档（40783名），2024年大幅回升至24304名，2025年继续回升至1 6803名，近两年呈明显恢复性上升趋势，2025年较2024年前移约7500名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划：2021年88人、2022年89人、2023年91人、2024年91人、 2025年94人，2026年大幅扩招至129人，较2025年增加35人（增幅约37.2%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重大影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、 双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第80名，2025年第79名，排名稳定在80名左右，属全国中上游水平；2026年学校声誉偏负面，涉及学术不端事件通报；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌）；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；管理科学 与工程为A级学科，是该校唯一A-及以上学科；车辆工程、机械工程等工科专业在行业内具有较高认可度，被誉为"汽车界的黄埔军校"。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子 信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等合工大优势工科专业持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；贵州省2026年普通高考总人数约299000人，；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，非贵州省本 地高校，在贵州省招生占比约2%-3%（2025年物理类94人占该校全国总招生比例较小），无显著地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16803名、2026年大幅扩招37 .2%（显著增加录取机会，推动位次后移）、贵州省考生总数微增（竞争略有加剧，部分抵消扩招效应）、声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般（报考关注度无明显升温）等因素，结合考生规模微增和声誉因素做小幅前移修正。预测2026年物理类最低位次约20357名，区间19857–20857名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 12119 → 10509 → 40783 → 24304 → 16803. In 2023, there was an abnormal drop (40783), which significantly recovered to 24304 in 2024, and continued to recover to 16803 in 2025, showing a clear upward recovery trend in the past two years, with 2025 moving forward about 7500 places compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for this university in Guizhou Province Physics Category: 88 in 2021, 89 in 2022, 91 in 2023, 91 in 2024, 94 in 2025, and a significant expansion to 129 in 2026, an increase of 35 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 37.2%), which is a significant expansion that has a major impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked 80th in 2026 and 79th in 2025, stable around 80th, at the upper-middle level nationwide. In 2026, the university's reputation was somewhat negative, involving reports of academic misconduct. In 2025, the reputation was also somewhat negative (hot major admission scores plummeted). Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an evaluation of 'average', and short video exposure is at a medium level, with no obvious signs of increased application attention. Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, the only A- or above discipline at this university. Vehicle Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and other engineering majors have high recognition in the industry, earning it the reputation of 'the Whampoa Military Academy of the automotive industry'.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other advantageous engineering majors at Hefei University of Technology continue to be highly recommended, with high social application popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Guizhou Province general college entrance examination is about 299,000. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Guizhou Province, and its enrollment proportion in Guizhou Province is about 2%-3% (94 Physics Category students in 2025 account for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment), with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16803, the significant enrollment expansion of 37.2% in 2026 (significantly increasing admission opportunities, pushing the ranking backward), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in Guizhou Province (slightly intensifying competition, partially offsetting the expansion effect), a somewhat negative reputation and average Douyin popularity (no significant increase in application attention), and making a small forward adjustment based on the slight increase in candidate scale and reputation factors. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 20357, with a range of 19857–20857.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19857–20857, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 19857), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 20857), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors and pair them with Tier 3 safety options. Hefei University of Technology is known for its engineering strengths, and traditional advantageous majors such as Vehicle Engineering and Mechanical Engineering offer high cost-performance and are worth focusing on.
